message:
fix(btree,pager,mvcc): cursor EOF reset, ARC cache sharding fixes, semantic key digests

Cursor (cursor.rs):
- Reset at_eof=false before advance_next/prev in 4 seek paths to
  prevent stale EOF state after re-seek to valid position

Freelist (freelist.rs):
- Fix ptrmap boundary tests: page 262402 is itself a ptrmap page
  (returns None), clarify pending byte page slot is unused not shifted

ARC cache (arc_cache.rs, page_cache.rs):
- Remove incorrect ArcCache::lock() (returned first shard only);
  replace with resident_pages() summing all shards
- Fix wait_for_peer_load: check get() before request() to avoid
  consuming ghost-hit entries and corrupting ARC metadata
- Fix request_async loader: call request() for non-resident loaded
  pages to get proper lookup state for admit()
- Fix release_inflight_slot: remove entry before waking waiters,
  verify slot pointer matches before removal
- page_cache.rs: fix shard_index from & SHARD_MASK (low bits) to
  >> 25 (high bits) for 128-shard distribution

WAL backend (wal_adapter.rs, traits.rs):
- Change WalBackend::read_page and committed_txns_since_page from
  &self to &mut self (mutates internal snapshot state)

MVCC (materialize.rs):
- Switch key digest from bare blake3 truncation to
  SemanticKeyRef::compute_digest incorporating key kind and btree
  reference — prevents cross-btree key collisions in delta store

Pager (pager.rs):
- Remove dead with_wal_backend_read function
- Fix test mock call sites: .write().unwrap() -> .lock().unwrap()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
